policyCards.label: Eligible
items: Rebooking on next available United flight
Same class or higher — no charge
$15 meal voucher (delay > 3 hrs from original departure)

policyCards.label: Not Eligible
items: Hotel voucher — weather is uncontrollable under DOT rules

policyCards.label: Key Rules
items: Hotel not covered — communicate clearly and with empathy
Return itinerary in same PNR is automatically protected
Cash refund required only if passenger declines rebooking (7 business days)

prompt.text: Ask the passenger for their booking reference or last name + flight number.
Review the cancellation reason — this determines compensation eligibility. Then click 'View Rebooking Options'.
Return to the customer. Ask: 'I have a few options for you — do you prefer the earliest flight today, or a direct flight tomorrow morning?'
Review compensation eligibility before communicating to the passenger. Select what applies.
Select the passenger's preferred flight and issue the applicable compensation.
Use the checklist below as a guide — respond in your own words.

lookup.searchPlaceholder: Enter booking reference or last name...

policy.correctMessage: Correct. Rebooking + $15 meal voucher applies for weather delays exceeding 3 hours.

wrongButtons: Rebook in Economy — No Upgrade Carry-Over

items: Confirm new flight number and departure time
Confirm arrival time and new confirmation number
State that seat class carries over — no additional charge
Explain hotel is not covered for weather events (DOT rules)
Offer the $15 meal voucher and United Club lounge access
Confirm return flight is protected in the original booking
